title: A balance ring, a balancing device, a centrifugal pump and a method of balancing an axial thrust of the centrifugal pump
abstract: The present invention relates to single-or multi-stage centrifugal pumps having novel disc-type balancing device for balancing the axial forces of the pump. The disc-type balancing device is provided with at least one annular groove (58) in at least one of the non-axial counter surfaces (52) of the balancing disc and the counter member, and a flow passage (60) in at least one of the non-axial counter surfaces (52), the flow passage (60) leading from radially inside the balancing gap to the annular groove (58).
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A balance ring (50) for a balancing device (20) of a centrifugal pump, the balancing ring having an inner circumference (54), and an outer circumference (56), a front surface (52) extending therebetween, and at least one annular groove (58, 70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ) dividing the front surface (52) to an inner front surface portion (521 ) and an outer front surface portion (522), characterized in that at least one flow passage (60, 74, 78) is provided in the inner front surface portion (521 ), the at least one flow passage (60, 74, 78) extending outwardly from the inner circumference (54) to the at least one annular groove (58, 70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ). 2. The balance ring (50) of claim 1 , characterized in that more than one annular groove (70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ) is provided in the front surface (52), the at least one flow passage (74, 76, 78) extending outwardly from the inner circumference (54) to the outermost one of the more than one annular groove (70ГўВҖВқ). 3. The balance ring of claim 2, characterized in that one flow passage (78) extending outwardly from one inner annular groove (70ГўВҖВҷ) to another more outwardly annular groove (70ГўВҖВқ) has a cross sectional flow area smaller than a cross sectional area of the flow passage (76) extending outwardly from the inner circumference (54) to the radially innermost one (70ГўВҖВҷ) of the more than one annular groove. 4. A balance ring (50) for a balancing device (20) of a centrifugal pump, the balancing ring having an inner circumference (54), and an outer circumference (56), a front surface (52) extending therebetween, characterized in that at least one flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76) is provided in the front surface (52), the at least one flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76) extending outwardly from the inner circumference (54) thereof. 5. The balance ring of claim 4, characterized in at least one annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ) dividing the front surface (52) to an inner front surface portion (521 ) and an outer front surface portion (522), the at least one flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76) extending to the at least one annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ). 6. The balance ring of claim 4, characterized in that more than one annular groove (70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ) is provided in the front surface (52), the at least one flow passage (74, 76, 

 78) extending outwardly from the inner circumference (54) to the outermost one of the more than one annular groove (70ГўВҖВқ). 7. The balance ring of claim 6, characterized in that one flow passage (78) extending outwardly from one inner annular groove (70ГўВҖВҷ) to another more outwardly annular groove (70ГўВҖВқ) has a cross sectional flow area smaller than a cross sectional area of the flow passage (76) extending outwardly from the inner circumference (54) to the radially innermost one (70ГўВҖВҷ) of the more than one annular groove. 8. A balancing device (20) for balancing axial forces of a centrifugal pump, the balancing device (20) comprising a balancing disc (22) fastened, when installed for use, on a shaft (14) of the centrifugal pump for rotation therewith, and a stationary counter member (28) arranged, when installed for use, in connection with a casing (10) of the centrifugal pump, the balancing disc (22) and the counter member (28) leaving, when in use, therebetween a balancing cavity (36), the balancing cavity (36) having at its radially outer part a balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ), the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) being left between a first non-axial surface of the balancing disc (22) and a second non-axial surface of the counter member (28), the non-axial surfaces having an inner radius R1 , at least one of the first and the second non-axial surfaces being provided with at least one annular groove (58) having a radius Rg, the balancing device further comprising the balance ring (50) of any one of claims 1 - 3, the balance ring (50) being provided in connection with one of the balancing disc (22) and the stationary counter member (28), whereby one of the first non-axial surface and the second non- axial surface forms the front surface (56) of the balance ring (50). 9. The balancing device (20) in accordance with claim 8, characterized in at least one of the first and the second non-axial surfaces (52) being provided with at least one flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76) extending outwardly from the inner radius R1 up to the radius Rg. 10. The balancing device (20) in accordance with claim 8 or 9, characterized in that the at least one of the first and the second non-axial surfaces (52) being provided with the at least one outwardly extending flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76) is raised from the body of one of the balancing disc (22) and the counter member (28). 1 1. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 8, characterized in that the at least one annular groove (58) divides the at least one of the first and the second non-axial surfaces into an inner front surface portion (521 ) and an outer front surface portion (522), the outer front surface portion (522) having a radius R2. 12. The balancing device (20) in accordance with claim 11 , characterized in that the at least one outwardly extending flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76) is provided in the inner front surface portion (521 ). 13. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 8 - 12, characterized in that the at least one of the first and the second non-axial surfaces are provided with more than one annular groove (70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ), the radially outermost one (70ГўВҖВқ) of the annular grooves having a radius Rg. 14. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 8 - 13, characterized in that the at least one outwardly extending flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76, 78) has a cross sectional flow area pA, and the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) has a cross sectional flow area gA, the ratio pA/gA being more than 0.75 when the axial dimension of the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) is at most 0.02 mm. 15. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 8 - 14, characterized in that the annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ) has a depthГўВҖВҳgdГўВҖВҷ, the depth being at least 10-fold to that of the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) in operative condition. 16. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 8 - 15, characterized in that the annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ) has a dimensionГўВҖВҳgdГўВҖВҷ of 1 to tens of millimeters in a direction at right angles to the first and the second non- axial surfaces (52). 17. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 8 - 16, characterized in that the annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ) has a dimensionГўВҖВҳgwГўВҖВҷ of 1 to tens of millimeters in a radial direction. 18. A balancing device (20) for balancing axial forces of a centrifugal pump, the balancing device (20) comprising a balancing disc (22) fastened, when installed for use, on a 

 shaft (14) of the centrifugal pump for rotation therewith, and a stationary counter member (28) arranged, when installed for use, in connection with a casing (10) of the centrifugal pump, the balancing disc (22) and the counter member (28) leaving, when in use, therebetween a balancing cavity (36), the balancing cavity (36) having at its radially outer part a balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ), the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) being left between a first non-axial surface of the balancing disc (22) and a second non-axial surface of the counter member (28), the non-axial surfaces having an inner radius R1 , the balancing device further comprising the balance ring (50) of any one of claims 4 - 7, the balance ring (50) being provided in connection with one of the balancing disc (22) and the stationary counter member (28), whereby one of the first non-axial surface and the second non-axial surface forms the front surface (56) of the balance ring (50). 19. The balancing device (20) in accordance with claim 18, characterized in at least one of the first and the second non-axial surfaces (52) being provided with at least one flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76) extending outwardly from the inner radius R1 up to the radius Rg. 20. The balancing device (20) in accordance with claim 18 or 19, characterized in that the at least one of the first and the second non-axial surfaces (52) being provided with the at least one outwardly extending flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76) is raised from the body of one of the balancing disc (22) and the counter member (28). 21. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 18 - 20, characterized in that the at least one annular groove (58) divides the at least one of the first and the second non-axial surfaces into an inner front surface portion (521 ) and an outer front surface portion (522), the outer front surface portion (522) having a radius R2. 22. The balancing device (20) in accordance with claim 21 , characterized in that the at least one outwardly extending flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76) is provided in the inner front surface portion (521 ). 23. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 18 - 22, characterized in that the at least one of the first and the second non-axial 

 surfaces are provided with more than one annular groove (58; 70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ), the radially outermost one (70ГўВҖВқ) of the annular grooves having a radius Rg. 24. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 18 - 23, characterized in that the at least one outwardly extending flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76, 78) has a cross sectional flow area pA, and the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) has a cross sectional flow area gA, the ratio pA/gA being more than 0.75 when the axial dimension of the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) is at most 0.02 mm. 25. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 18 - 24, characterized in that the annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ) has a depthГўВҖВҳgdГўВҖВҷ, the depth being at least 10-fold to that of the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) in operative condition. 26. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 18 - 25, characterized in that the annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ) has a dimensionГўВҖВҳgdГўВҖВҷ of 1 to tens of millimeters in a direction at right angles to the first and the second non- axial surfaces (52). 27. The balancing device (20) in accordance with any one of the preceding claims 18 - 26, characterized in that the annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ) has a dimensionГўВҖВҳgwГўВҖВҷ of 1 to tens of millimeters in a radial direction. 28. A centrifugal pump comprising the balancing device (20) of any one of claims 8 - 27. 29. A method of balancing an axial thrust of the centrifugal pump of claim 15, the method comprising the initial steps of a) providing an adjustable balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) between the first and the second non-axial surfaces (52), b) providing at least one annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ) in at least one of the first and the second non-axial surfaces (52), and c) reducing the pressure affecting the liquid flow in the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) from the pressure upstream of the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) to the pressure downstream of the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) in more than one step by using at least one annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ, 70ГўВҖВқ), the method being characterized by the further steps of 

 d) providing at least one of the first and the second non-axial surface (52) radially inside of the annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ) with a fixed constriction (60, 72, 74, 76) extending from radially inside the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) to the at least one annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ), whereby e) when the axial dimension of the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) is in its normal operating range, ГўВҖВў allowing most of the liquid pass to the annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ) through the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) so that pressure is reduced in the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) upstream of the annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ), and f) when the axial dimension of the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) is below its normal operating range, ГўВҖВў allowing a significant part of the liquid pass to the annular groove (58, 70, 70ГўВҖВҷ) along the outwardly extending flow passage (60, 72, 74, 76), whereby the pressure remains substantially the same in the balancing gap (36ГўВҖВҷ) and affects the surface of the balancing disc (22) between the radius R2 and the shaft of the pump.
